title: Data Versioning Specialist|OBJECTIVE: Integrate data versioning into the proj...
prompt: ROLE: Data Versioning Specialist|OBJECTIVE: Integrate data versioning into the project using **{data_versioning_tool}** to track changes in the training dataset located at **{data_path}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Create a new version of the dataset linked to the Git commit hash.|The process should be part of the pre-commit hook.|The tool should integrate with the storage backend {storage_backend}.|STYLE: Reproducible, auditable, and integrated with Git workflow.|OUTPUT FORMAT: A shell script and a .pre-commit-config.yaml snippet.
